creator: dbaio@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Kurt Jaeger from comment #3)

I picked a random bug about the IPv6 ND neighbor solicitation issue (probably related).

We can't provide any other information here.

I'm monitoring several jails in our cluster to get this on a not-so-important resource, so we can better debug and give more information about the matter.

I'm closing this again because it will unlikely hit the same resource soon.

If you wish to keep it open, feel free to do so, but please assign it to yourself or the postmaster instead.

Thank you for your understanding.
